description: Required JSON shape for the DQ-USG-2026-05-C LUMAFORMS May 2026 commercial usage correction response.

correction_sql.description: A safe SQLite UPDATE statement or script that applies only approved case DQ-USG-2026-05-C to usage_daily and populates audit fields.

changed_row_count.description: Number of usage_daily rows changed by the approved correction.

total_compute_hours_after_fix.description: Qualified May 2026 LUMAFORMS compute hours for commercial accounts after applying the correction.

top_accounts_after_fix.ordering: Top five qualified commercial LUMAFORMS accounts ordered by compute_hours descending, then account_id ascending.

rounding: Round compute_hours values to two decimal places. Counts and api_calls must be integers.
